title: Wake-word detection via openwakeword
what_failed: Pi had no wake-word capability — voice mode required explicit PTT/VAD trigger.
fix_applied: tools/tools_wakeword.py: WakeWordDetector class. wait_for_wake_word(timeout_secs) blocks until openwakeword model fires above threshold (default 0.5). Lazy singleton model load with threading.Lock. is_available() for graceful fallback check. Supports custom model list or falls back to openwakeword built-ins.
